what: Native attachment save/share + binary round-trip on Android (fixed build, ai.elizaos.app debug 2026-07-01, emulator-5556 / Android 14 x86_64), driven via CDP inside the real app.

before.cause1: @capacitor/share + @capacitor/filesystem were never dependencies of packages/app — download-share.ts's structural global-bridge read could never fire (Android AND iOS)
before.cause2_found_during_fix: run-mobile-build.mjs patchGradleFileForAgp9 strips `apply plugin: kotlin-android` from plugin gradle files; @capacitor/filesystem 8.x is Kotlin-only → compileDebugJavaWithJavac NO-SOURCE → empty AAR → ClassNotFound: FilesystemPlugin at boot
before.cause3_systemic: Capacitor's PluginManager.loadPluginClasses() is ALL-OR-NOTHING: the single missing class threw PluginLoadException and silently abandoned ALL 24 auto-registered plugins (app ran with 9 natives: 5 manual + built-ins). Captured in 10936-logcat-prefix.log.

after.shareSheet: opened with the real file (see 10936-share-sheet-open.png / .mp4) — targets: Nearby Share, Print, Drive, Maps, Messages
after.flowMirrorsDownloadShareTs: fetch → Filesystem.writeFile(CACHE) → getUri → Share.share({files:[uri]}) — the exact code path in packages/ui/src/utils/download-share.ts

webTransportRoundTrip: see 10936-binary-roundtrip-proof.json — uploaded sha256 == served sha256 == content-addressed URL
